docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MO, JING LU HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-28-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER JING MO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PETITIONER MO, JING LU
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ****INVALIDATED DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF FILING FEES. SEE ORDER OF 4/12/12.***** FILED BY PETITIONER MO, JING LU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF PETITIONER JING LU MO ON 2/28/12 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER MO, JING LU
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER MO, JING LU HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR.MATTER STRICKEN FOR FAILURE TO NOT PAY FILING FEES.
